{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/132373212?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dhabaleshwar/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dhabaleshwar/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dhabaleshwar/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dhabaleshwar/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/dhabaleshwar", "id": 132373212, "login": "dhabaleshwar", "node_id": "U_kgDOB-Pa3A", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dhabaleshwar/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dhabaleshwar/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dhabaleshwar/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dhabaleshwar/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/dhabaleshwar/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/dhabaleshwar", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40320", "cvss": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 5.4, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:L"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1336", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements Used in a Template Engine"}], "description": "## Summary
 
The `ConformityCheck` class in `giskard-checks` rendered the `rule` parameter through Jinja2's default `Template()` constructor. Because the `rule` string is silently interpreted as a Jinja2 template, a developer may not realize that template expressions embedded in rule definitions are evaluated at runtime. In a scenario where check definitions are loaded from an untrusted source (e.g. a shared project file or externally contributed configuration), this could lead to arbitrary code execution.

`giskard-checks` is a local developer testing library with no network-facing service. Check definitions, including the `rule` parameter, are provided in application code or project configuration files and executed locally. Exploitation requires write access to a check definition and subsequent execution of the test suite by a developer.

However, the implicit template evaluation of the `rule` parameter is not obvious from the API surface. This hidden behavior increases the likelihood of a developer inadvertently passing untrusted input to it when integrating the library into a larger system. 

## Affected Component
 
`conformity.py`, line 59:
```python
from jinja2 import Template
...
formatted_rule = Template(self.rule).render(trace=trace)
```
 
## Affected Versions
 
`giskard-checks` < 1.0.2b1
 
## Patched Version
 
`giskard-checks` >= **1.0.2b1** (template parsing removed from rule evaluation entirely)
 
## Remediation
 
Upgrade to `giskard-checks` >= 1.0.2b1. The template rendering has been removed from rule evaluation.
 
## Credit
 
Giskard-AI thanks @dhabaleshwar for identifying the unsandboxed template usage.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00144, "percentile": 0.04005}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-7xjm-g8f4-rp26", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-14T23:13:52Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7xjm-g8f4-rp26", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-7xjm-g8f4-rp26"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40320"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-17T18:16:32Z", "published_at": "2026-04-14T23:13:52Z", "references": ["https://github.com/Giskard-AI/giskard-oss/security/advisories/GHSA-7xjm-g8f4-rp26", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40320", "https://github.com/Giskard-AI/giskard-oss/releases/tag/giskard-checks%2Fv1.0.2b1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-7xjm-g8f4-rp26"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/Giskard-AI/giskard-oss/security-advisories/GHSA-7xjm-g8f4-rp26", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/Giskard-AI/giskard-oss", "summary": "Giskard has Unsandboxed Jinja2 Template Rendering in ConformityCheck", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-04-27T15:02:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-7xjm-g8f4-rp26", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.0.2b1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "giskard-checks"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.0.1b1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Giskard has Unsandboxed Jinja2 Template Rendering in ConformityCheck
